question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/ConsensusValidatorImpl.java -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: validate()] Can an unprivileged external user trigger a network partition scenario by flooding the signature pipeline with crafted StreamFileSignature objects bearing distinct fileHashAsHex values, causing signatureHashMap to split verified stake across multiple buckets so that no single bucket reaches the canReachConsensus() threshold, permanently halting stream ingestion?
